headline: 观看：预计将出现G1级地磁风暴
impacts_text: 影响区域主要在磁纬60度以北。感应电流 - 可能出现微弱的电网波动。航天器 - 可能对卫星运行产生轻微影响。极光 - 在高纬度地区（如美国北部，例如密歇根州北部和缅因州）可能可见极光。
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: WATA20
Serial Number: 1112
Issue Time: 2026 May 16 2134 UTC

WATCH: Geomagnetic Storm Category G1 Predicted 
Highest Storm Level Predicted by Day:
May 17:  G1 (Minor)   May 18:  G1 (Minor)   May 19:  None (Below G1)   
THIS SUPERSEDES ANY/ALL PRIOR WATCHES IN EFFECT
Comment: 



NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 60 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Weak power grid fluctuations can occur.
Spacecraft - Minor impact on satellite operations possible.
Aurora - Aurora may be visible at high latitudes, i.e., northern tier of the U.S. such as northern Michigan and Maine.

details.may_17: G1 (Minor)   May 18:  G1 (Minor)   May 19:  None (Below G1)

headline: 警报：地磁K指数为6
impacts_text: 影响区域主要在磁纬55度以北。感应电流 - 可能发生电网波动。高纬度电力系统可能会出现电压警报。航天器 - 可能出现卫星姿态异常；低地球轨道卫星的阻力可能会增加。无线电 - 高频（HF）无线电传播在高纬度地区可能会减弱。极光 - 在低至纽约州、威斯康星州到华盛顿州的地区可能可见极光。
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTK06
Serial Number: 717
Issue Time: 2026 May 15 2215 UTC

ALERT: Geomagnetic K-index of 6 
Threshold Reached: 2026 May 15 2215 UTC
Synoptic Period: 2100-2400
Active Warning: YES
Noaa Scale: G2 - Moderate
Comment: 

NOAA Scale: G2 - Moderate

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 55 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Power grid fluctuations can occur. High-latitude power systems may experience voltage alarms.
Spacecraft - Satellite orientation irregularities may occur; increased drag on low Earth-orbit satellites is possible.
Radio - HF (high frequency) radio propagation can fade at higher latitudes.
Aurora - Aurora may be seen as low as New York to Wisconsin to Washington state.

headline: 观看：预计将出现 G2 级地磁风暴
impacts_text: 影响区域主要位于地磁纬度 55 度以北。感应电流 - 电网可能会出现波动。高纬度电力系统可能会出现电压警报。航天器 - 卫星可能会出现姿态异常；低地球轨道卫星的阻力可能会增加。无线电 - 高频 (HF) 无线电传播在高纬度地区可能会减弱。极光 - 在纽约到威斯康星州再到华盛顿州等低纬度地区可能观测到极光。

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 55 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Power grid fluctuations can occur. High-latitude power systems may experience voltage alarms.
Spacecraft - Satellite orientation irregularities may occur; increased drag on low Earth-orbit satellites is possible.
Radio - HF (high frequency) radio propagation can fade at higher latitudes.
Aurora - Aurora may be seen as low as New York to Wisconsin to Washington state.

details.comment: included the G1 watch for day3 (17 May)

headline: 警告：预计地磁K指数为4
impacts_text: 影响区域主要在65度地磁纬度以北。感应电流 - 可能发生微弱的电网波动。极光 - 在加拿大和阿拉斯加等高纬度地区可能可见极光。
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: WARK04
Serial Number: 5337
Issue Time: 2026 May 13 2027 UTC

WARNING: Geomagnetic K-index of 4 expected 
Valid From: 2026 May 13 2026 UTC
Valid To: 2026 May 14 0600 UTC
Warning Conditions: Onset
Comment: 



NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 65 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Weak power grid fluctuations can occur.
Aurora - Aurora may be visible at high latitudes such as Canada and Alaska.

headline: 观看：预计将出现 G2 级地磁风暴
impacts_text: 影响区域主要位于地磁纬度 55 度以北。感应电流 - 电网可能会出现波动。高纬度电力系统可能会出现电压警报。航天器 - 卫星可能会出现姿态异常；低地球轨道卫星的阻力可能会增加。无线电 - 高频 (HF) 无线电传播在高纬度地区可能会减弱。极光 - 在纽约到威斯康星州再到华盛顿州等低纬度地区可能观测到极光。

Aurora - Aurora may be seen as low as New York to Wisconsin to Washington state.

headline: 观看：预计将出现G1级地磁风暴
impacts_text: 影响区域主要在地磁纬度60度以北。感应电流：可能会出现微弱的电网波动。航天器：可能对卫星运行产生轻微影响。极光：在高纬度地区（例如美国北部地区，如密歇根州北部和缅因州）可能可见极光。
